site.name: Bond
site.description: The agreement app for the people who matter most. Make a promise, track it, honor it — all in one place.

hero.subhead: The agreement app for the people who matter most. Make a promise, track it, honor it — all in one place.
hero.downloadHint: Coming soon to iPhone and Android.

whatIsABond.headline: A simple agreement, beautifully tracked.
body: Bond turns informal promises and formal agreements into structured, trackable, digitally signed records — without paperwork or awkward messages.
Quick Bonds are casual and fun ("You owe me dinner"). Formal Bonds are serious and structured (a rental, a loan, a freelance contract). Both look polished. Both are tracked end to end.

partyA.name: David Cohen
partyA.providing: Dinner at the new pasta place

items.title: Agreements made simple
items.body: Create, share, and sign personal agreements with the people who matter most.
items.alt: Bond app onboarding screen showing the cursive Bond signature mark and the headline 'Agreements made simple.'

items.title: Secure & Private
items.body: Every Bond is cryptographically signed, legally timestamped, and stored with bank-grade encryption.
items.alt: Bond app onboarding screen with a shield icon and the headline 'Secure & Private.'

items.title: Stay in Sync
items.body: Track changes, receive instant notifications, and manage all your agreements in one place.
items.alt: Bond app onboarding screen with a sync arrows icon and the headline 'Stay in Sync.'

refrain.headline: Make a promise. Track it. Honor it.

allInOnePlace.headline: Every contract, finally simple.
allInOnePlace.body: Bond takes the heavy lifting out of agreements. Send them, track them, follow up, organize them — every contract you've ever made, kept in one place and always within reach.

comingSoon.headline: Make your first Bond.
comingSoon.subhead: Coming soon to iPhone. Android shortly after.
comingSoon.notify: Want to be notified at launch?

hero_image_alt: Bond app showing a 'Dinner Bond' between Nimrod and David, with a 'Bond Signed' confirmation overlay.
